name: Measure-Command

options.name: -Expression
options.description: Specifies the expression that is being timed. Enclose the expression in braces (`{}`).

options.name: -InputObject
options.description: Objects bound to the InputObject parameter are optional input for the script block passed to the Expression parameter. Inside the script block, `$_` can be used to reference the current object in the pipeline.

args.name: -Expression
args.description: Specifies the expression that is being timed. Enclose the expression in braces (`{}`).

description: Measures the time it takes to run script blocks and cmdlets.
